profile_notes.nsys_capture: C50 nsys capture ran on the restored C40f-style MTP command, but baked nsys 2023.4.4 failed qdstrm import with QuadD EventCollection wrong-event-order before producing .nsys-rep stats.
profile_notes.hotspot_attribution: The top hotspot table therefore carries forward the latest successful current-main decode NVTX attribution from post-#442, while C50 establishes that the restored C40f MTP harness remains above alpha/decode gates on current main.
profile_notes.next_target: GDN gate/gated-norm fusion or vendored GDN decode-side reduction, not C48 model-math investigation.
